learnerInstructions: Read the animated trace before opening the implementation file.
Edit only the file named in the exercise unless the task explicitly asks for another file.
Keep the supplied header and main.c test harness intact.
Click Run and compare the output with the expected behavior.
forbiddenActions: Replace the supplied harness with hard-coded output
notes: The C profile compiles all authored .c files together and keeps headers in the same workspace.
Starter and solution workspaces must contain matching paths so reveal and golden validation are deterministic.
